hypothesis: If weighted combinations of property-specific embedding vectors learned by a Concept Bottleneck Model are added to the intermediate hidden activations of a frozen molecular LLM, then the model will generate valid, novel, and synthesizable molecules whose predicted properties (e.g., QED and LogP) match target values with lower MAE and higher generative efficiency than existing steering baselines (ActAdd) and comparable performance to supervised fine-tuning/LoRA.
